name: Prime Security Bank
description_short: Community bank established in 1925 offering personal banking, business checking, CDs, and mortgages with local decision-making and personalized service.
description_long:
Prime Security Bank is a community-focused financial institution that has operated since 1925, positioning itself as an alternative to large national banks. The bank serves both personal and business customers across multiple locations including Shakopee, Eagan, and Karlstad, with a stated mission to be "the community bank of choice" in its markets. The organization emphasizes local relationship banking and decision-making, with leadership that includes a community-based board of directors and named loan officers at each branch.

The bank offers a range of financial products including high-yield CDs (currently 4.00% APY for 3-month terms with $10,000 minimum deposit), personal and business checking accounts, mortgage services for home purchases and refinancing, and commercial lending for various business purposes. Their promotional offerings include free business checking and competitive CD rates across multiple terms. The mortgage banking division is staffed with named loan officers who handle both new loans and refinancing.

Prime Security Bank differentiates itself through several stated operational practices: customer-centric responsiveness, live phone answering without automated systems, emphasis on long-term financial partnerships, and local-level decision making. The bank specifically targets small business owners and professionals, with lending expertise in industries including manufacturing, construction, restaurants, and commercial real estate. Customer testimonials highlight responsiveness during project challenges and willingness to offer non-standard solutions compared to larger lenders.

As a traditional community bank, Prime Security Bank serves customers who value personal relationships and local decision-making over digital convenience. However, the website provides limited information about digital banking capabilities, mobile apps, or online account management. The $10,000 minimum deposit requirement for advertised CD rates may exclude smaller savers. The bank's strength appears concentrated in commercial lending and relationship-based banking rather than consumer-focused fintech innovations. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: High-yield CDs with fixed interest rates (3-month, 6-month, 13-month terms)
Mortgage lending for home purchases and refinancing
Equipment financing and leasehold improvement loans
Working capital and business line of credit
Construction lending for builders and developers
pros: Established 1925 with nearly a century of community banking history and stability
Live customer service representatives answer all phone calls (no automated operators)
Competitive CD rates: 4.00% APY for 3-month CDs, 3.63% for 6-month, 3.50% for 13-month
Local decision-making by named loan officers and market presidents at each branch
Specialized commercial lending for diverse industries including startups, M&A, and real estate
FDIC insurance coverage on all deposits up to applicable limits
cons: $10,000 minimum deposit required to obtain advertised CD rates
Substantial penalty for early CD withdrawal (terms not specified on website)
Limited information about digital banking, mobile app capabilities, or online services
Geographic limitation to Minnesota markets (Shakopee, Eagan, Karlstad) may not serve all customers
Website does not detail personal loan products, credit cards, or other consumer lending options
best_for: Small business owners and self-employed professionals seeking relationship-based lending with local decision-makers
Commercial real estate investors, builders, and developers needing specialized industry expertise
Savers with $10,000+ looking for competitive CD rates with FDIC protection and personal service
Customers in Minnesota markets who prefer human interaction over automated banking systems
diagnosis: Prime Security Bank is best for small business owners, commercial real estate professionals, and savers in Minnesota who prioritize personalized service, local decision-making, and competitive rates over digital convenience. The main caveat is that this is a regional community bank with limited online/digital capabilities and a $10,000 minimum for promotional CD rates, making it less suitable for tech-focused customers or those with smaller deposits.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
